retrieved_context: ATLANTIS The dialogue where Atlantis is first mentioned by Plato TIMAEUS. ATLANTIS Atlantis was described by Plato as being located beyond the Pillars of Hercules, indicating its supposed position relative to the known world PILLARS OF HERCULES. ATLANTIS Some theories suggest Atlantis was located in the Atlantic Ocean ATLANTIC OCEAN. ATLANTIS Some theories suggest Atlantis was located in Antarctica ANTARCTICA. ATLANTIS The dialogue where the story of Atlantis is further elaborated by Plato CRITIAS. ATLANTIS Some theories suggest Atlantis was located in the Mediterranean Sea MEDITERRANEAN SEA. ATLANTIS Plato introduced the story of Atlantis in his dialogues, making him the primary source of the legend PLATO.
